programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a renowned author is murdered, Matlock defends the accused – the subject of a biography the victim was writing – only to encounter a disturbing revelation about his client midway through the trial.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock

programme.desc: Inspired by his wife and lover, Harvard psychologist and inventor Dr. William Moulton Marston creates one of the greatest female superheroes of all time -- the beloved comic book character Wonder Woman.

programme.desc: Lonely, 12-year-old Oskar is bullied by his classmates. A new friendship develops when Eli, a pale young girl who only comes out at night, moves in next door. Coinciding with her arrival is a series of inexplicable disappearances and murders.

programme.title: Hart's War

programme.desc: Lola and Lana try out for Bluebell Scouts, but discover one of them might be more suited for it; when Lincoln and Clyde think Bobby is cheating on Lori, they follow him around town gathering evidence.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Dad gets upset with the children for never locking the front door, they decide to take home security to the next level; when Lincoln accidentally erases his childhood photos, he and Clyde attempt to recreate them before his memory fades.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The sisters think Lincoln is bad luck so they ban him from attending their activities; when Lincoln finds out his class is dissecting frogs, he and Lana embark on a mission to rescue them.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde's spring break plans are put in jeopardy when they only have one day to complete their list; Lori throws a sophisticated party, but it backfires when her guests do not like what she has planned.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Tired of monotonous meals, the children make a plan to sabotage dinner so they can have pizza; Lincoln and Ronnie Anne have to take care of an egg baby, but Lincoln does not trust her with the fragile egg.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde submit an Ace Savvy comic to a meet-the-creator contest, but are foiled by a surprising nemesis; when Lana brings home a new pet, whom the children adore, the four original Loud pets scheme to get rid of him.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When the children hear Lily curse, they become worried that they have been a bad influence on her; when a love letter addressed to L. Loud arrives, the family tries to figure out who it was meant for.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Ronnie Anne and Bobby visit their crazy extended family, Bobby fits in great, but Ronnie Anne struggles with the smothering nature of their relatives.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Afraid they will be forgotten, Lincoln and Clyde want to make a splash in the yearbook and crash group photos; seeing his sisters fight with their roommates, Lincoln suggests a room shuffle based on a compatibility test.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Clyde, worried that Lincoln is hung up on Ronnie Anne, tries to cure his post-breakup blues; tired of her siblings walking all over her, Lucy turns to a spell book to teach her siblings a lesson.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The Loud family believe that they are safe from pranks on April Fool's Day because prankster Luan is away at camp; when the children discover that their father is not at his old job anymore, they begin to worry it might be their fault.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde find out that "ARGGH!" is coming to town; Lori moves to the garage.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Clyde is desperate to learn how to act normal around Lori, so he enlists Leni's help; worried that their parents are hurting their health from not being active, the children encourage them to exercise.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After meeting an impressive family, the Loud parents worry that their children are not doing enough to ensure successful futures; tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship during board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The sisters enlist Lincoln, the "Master of Convincing," to teach them how to ask their parents for money; when Lisa's report card reveals that she has failed social skills, she must make a friend in order to bring up her grade.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Luan overhears her siblings complaining about her comedy, she decides to give it up; knowing Leni's history of spoiling surprises, the children decide not to tell her about their mother's upcoming party.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Dad and Lincoln get on "Legends of the Hidden Temple" and cannot wait to for a whole day of father-and-son bonding; Lincoln wants to go to the mall but has to watch his younger sisters, so he decides to take them to the mall.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The family embarks on a reading challenge at the library, but Lola refuses to participate; when Lincoln discovers the first page of his baby book is blank, he worries his parents are hiding something.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The children give Lily an old singing toy from the attic to help her stop crying, but it quickly drives them crazy; the kids try to convince Dad of the wonders of modern technology after he declares war on their electronic devices.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lana convinces the children to go to the Burpin' Burger to meet her racecar driving hero despite the heavy snowfall; when Lincoln goes on vacation with Clyde, he realizes how overprotective Clyde's parents are.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: During a road trip to their vacation destination, everything that can go wrong for the family does.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln has a plan for introducing himself to a new girl; Pop Pop introduces his new girlfriend to the family; she seems great until she starts showing up unannounced.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Luna learns Chunk was like her in high school and worries her ambition to be a rocker is unrealistic; Lincoln wages war after his food is filched from the refrigerator.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Carol Pingrey's photograph gets more "likes" on social media than Lori's, she tries to one-up her; thinking it looks like fun, the other kids try to get in on Lola's home-schooling.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lori and Lincoln visit the city, where Lori struggles to be a city girl; Lincoln finds that Ronnie Anne has changed; the family uses stunt doubles in its plan to avoid Luan's April Fool's Day pranking.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lynn desperately wants to win a basketball championship but gets drafted onto a terrible team; Mom and Dad decide to build a secret bathroom after they become sick of waiting their turn in line.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lucy becomes annoyed when Lori and Leni start watching her vampire show because of a cute new character; Mom gets community service for racking up tickets.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde set Coach Pacowski and Mrs. Johnson up in an effort to make gym class better; Luan teaches Lucy how to manage the ups and downs of pursuing a life in the arts.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lisa gets invited to work at an institute and get away from her crazy family; Lori and Bobby worry that long-distance dating is causing them to lose their connection.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde worry that they may be too old to still be playing Ace Savvy; Lincoln discovers that having a friend over means getting special privileges and he takes advantage of that.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The boys struggle with whether to attend Liam's barn sleepover or Girl Jordan's awesome pool party; the kids worry that Leni is too weak and they try to teach her how to be more aggressive.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Lola advances to a regional pageant she worries she could lose for the first time; Dad has Mr. Grouse watch Lily while he goes to a concert but things quickly start to go wrong.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When termites infest the house, half the family stays with Pop Pop and the others stay with Aunt Ruth; Lincoln has to complete a woodworking assignment, but has a history of failure on the topic.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Por cada hada, hay un anti-hadas, y por lo tanto Anti-Poof nace. Depende de Poof para detenerlo de destruir del mundo y sus seres queridos.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: El padre de Timmy está demasiado ocupado para pasar tiempo con él, entonces él pide más padres; los Squirrely Scouts y los Cream Puffs hacen una carrera hasta la cima del Mount Doom.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Poof mira demasiado un dibujo animado clásico pero violento sobre un gato y un ratón; Crocker está preocupado por las calificaciones de Timmy; Poof no toma su medicamento.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Crocker quiere un heredero para su supuesta fama y fortuna. Los dioses griegos buscan venganza cuando Timmy destruye el monte Olimpo.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy desea ser una mosca en la pared cuando le prohíben ver una película de terror. Cuando Cosmo y Wanda están ocupados cuidando a Poof, Timmy desea un hada temporal que cumpla sus deseos.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: La magia del Mundo de Mágico se apaga después de que Crocker es hipnotizado hasta no creer en las hadas; cuando Cosmo es expulsado de la casa, se convierte en el nuevo héroe de Dimmsdale.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Crocker está convencido de que el padre de Timmy es un hada y se dispone a probarlo; Timmy conoce a sus abuelos y desea que nunca hayan ido a América.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy desea impresionar a todos con su música después de ser rechazado por la banda de la escuela; Vicky conoce la generosidad de Timmy cuando él la salva de un accidente horrible.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Poof transforma a todos en pollos; Timmy se roba las flechas de Cupido en un intento para que Trixie se enamore de él.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: El hermano de Cosmo viene a visitarlo. Nadie quiere jugar con Poof, por lo que se escapa a Yugopotamia, un lugar donde él es el centro de atención.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy impresiona al jefe de su padre cuando él se une a su padre en el trabajo un día; Timmy se convierte mágicamente talentoso en el fútbol después de comer Poof accidentalmente.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Foop escapa de la cárcel y convence a Cosmo y a Wanda de que se ha reformado; cuando Timmy desea ser la mascota del profesor, Poof le cumple su deseo y lo convierte en un conejillo de indias de la clase del Sr. Crocker.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Wanda cambia el cerebro de Timmy con el cerebro de su madre; Crocker decide iniciar la caza de duendes en lugar de hadas.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: De vacaciones en Hawái, Timmy desea que sus padres participen en una peligrosa competencia de surfeo. ¿Podrán papá y mamá dejar de surfear antes que los lleve a la destrucción?

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Después de fracasar miserablemente en un programa de juego para los alumnos de 6to grado, papá admite que abandonó la escuela en el quinto grado. Lo siguiente que Timmy se entera es que su papá está en su clase.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy desea que mamá sea la mejor cocinera del mundo; y luego, los Turner ganan un concurso para ser la primera familia en el espacio - ¿o no?

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy pide prestado el Fake-i-fier de Mark Chang, para poder asistir a la fiesta de disfraces de Trixie; Cosmo debe hacer cumplir las normas cuando a Jorgen le dan los Trick-ups.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Papá hace naufragar a los Turner y tiene que salvar a la familia antes de que la isla explote. Timmy pide el deseo de tener oscuridad completa para poder dormir en paz un poco.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: El padre de Timmy convierte su casa en una granja; el Sr. Crocker intenta exponer a los monstruos en un programa web.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Wanda debe dirigir el negocio familiar cuando Big Daddy es secuestrado; Timmy desea que su madre pueda venderle una casa a cualquiera.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy desea el hermano mayor perfecto; Timmy desea que todo en la escuela se mezclara como un rompecabezas.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: El papá de Timmy trata de ayudarlo con su tarea. Pero como él no es el padre más inteligente, su ayuda puede causar más daño que bien.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy desea ser un pez; Timmy desea un dispositivo que le permita intercambiar lugares con cualquiera.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy logra escaparse de Vicky. Desafortunadamente, la nueva niñera es el padre de Papá, Pappy. Pappy detesta todo lo moderno, mientras que a Timmy le encanta todo lo novedoso.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Jimmy y Timmy quieren invitar a Cindy al baile., por eso comienzan un duelo.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Jimmy y Timmy deciden enfrentarse en un duelo porque ambos quieren invitar a Cindy al baile del viernes 13.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Un perro roba el esqueleto de un dinosaurio; Winslow enseña clips de CatDog en el desayuno; Cat conoce a su estrella cinematográfica favorita.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Cat enseña a Dog a jugar golf; Dog desarrolla una alergia.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Cat se hace pasar por un surfista para impresionar a una chica; Dog persigue una libélula por toda la casa.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Cat y Dog tienen algunos sueños musicales en `It's a Wonderful Half Life', luego en `Shepherd Dog', Cat y Dog se reúnen con un ex-granjero de ovejas escocés.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Dog crea su propia energía eléctrica; Dog fertiliza el césped del pasillo de Cat.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony explores Naples on a quest to define true Italian food and culture.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony's itinerary includes Zanzibar, the Serengeti and Ngorongoro Crater.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony and noted chef Daniel Boulud visit Boulud's hometown of Lyon, France.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony takes a personal trip to the haunts of his youth in Massachusetts.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: On the eve of the Olympics in Sochi, Tony visits Moscow and St. Petersburg.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony enjoys Paraguay's rich culture and savory local dishes.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony travels to Mexico City, Oaxaca and Cuernavaca in Mexico.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony dives into the state of Punjab, India, starting off in Amritsar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony explores the widely diverse cuisines and cultures found in the Bronx.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Anthony Bourdain explores the vibrant, dynamic city of Shanghai.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony heads back to his beloved Salvador in northeastern Brazil.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony heads to Iran, a country few Americans have visited since 1979.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Anthony Bourdain travels to Las Vegas with food author Michael Ruhlman.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony journeys to Hue in Vietnam, a city he has never been to before.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony travels to Jamaica and learns about music legend Bob Marley.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony teams up with Andy Ricker for an adventure in Chiang Mai, Thailand.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony enjoys the diverse food and varied music scenes in Mississippi.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Look What You Did to Your Baby
programme.desc: Kristy wants her baby back from her mother Donna! Donna claims she took the baby away because he was born with severe disabilities due to Kristy’s drug use during pregnancy. Who’s the liar?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Steven wants to prove to his wife Stephanie that he is not gay and has never cheated on her with a man. Then, Tiaha doubts Jamal's fidelity because he stays out late and is distant. What shocking truths will their lie detector tests reveal?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Thornton says he can't trust his cheating girlfriend Crystal and wants her to take a lie detector test! Plus, Stephanie wants to prove to her husband, Mathew that she's not having sex with her own family member! She wants the accusations put to rest.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This
programme.desc: Is Khadisa's boyfriend Chad cheating on her with her own sister? Will Maya's ex trust her and her current beau with their infant son?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Mable is having an affair with her friend Cooikie's man, Levy. Although Levy has been cheating on Cookie, he still loves her and even proposes marriage! Next, Shae is here to confront her friend for sleeping with her man and get him back for good!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Richie will tell Shelly he has been sleeping with DeeDee and Lesley. Then, Gina will confess to her boyfriend, Rob, that she is sleeping with his best friend, Joe!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Bonnie says she has been sleeping with her daughters girlfriend. Next, Akeem wants to confess to his girlfriend about his shocking affair. Then, Nick is ready to come clean about why he will only have sex with the lights off.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Kenny lived with sisters Lora and Misty, who are also his lovers but he treats them like servants. Later, Jerry confronts Kenny with the results of the 9 positive paternity tests, but Kenny says he only cares about 2 of his 9 children.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Erin's tired of playing house and is ready to tell Eric she's been cheating, and she's moving on! Then Bill's been cheating on his girlfriend for some time and is ready to move on. But wait until she hears he's been sleeping with her step-sister!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Pamela is here today to tell her best friend, Terri, that she is sleeping with her son, Brandon. Next Deaire has been sleeping with Brenda's 62-year-old mother! Then Brandi will tell her fiancé that she's been having an affair with twin brothers!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Heaven and Justin are here today to confess their infidelity to each other…about the same woman! Next, Joan wants to know why Mistress Flame prefers her line of work!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jen is going to tell John that she is dumping him for her secret lover, 73 year old Jerry. Next Danika has a little surprise for her fiancé which she feels compelled to tell him that she's really a man.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: David has been married to Linda for 3 years and has been living in his car for 2½ of them! He claims that her children won't allow him in the house and in order to save his marriage, he camps out in his car parked next to their home.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Food flies when Chauncey tells Paula that he has been sleeping with the neighbor! Then, Julia has been a prostitute for 10 years and her boyfriend, Eddie, has never done anything to help her. Next, Little people, Eric and his family are back!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: They say you never forget your first time well these guests are here to live out their unforgettable first-time fantasies.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La relación de dos años de Anastasia y Robert terminó cuando él escuchó rumores de que ella le era infiel. Ella dice que siempre le ha sido fiel, pero Robert no le cree y ahora duda que sea el padre de su bebé recién nacido.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Stephanie dice que desde que llegó a casa del trabajo y encontró a su hijo de un año con un ojo morado, ha temido que la niñera de sus hijos los lastime. La niñera Cheryl niega las graves acusaciones acerca del niño.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Thornton dice que no puede confiar en su novia infiel Crystal y quiere que se someta al detector de mentiras. Además, Stephanie quiere demostrarle a su marido, Mathew, que no está teniendo sexo con un miembro de su familia.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Deshawn afirma que su ex Lynette abandonó a su hijo de 5 años. Pero ella afirma que él la está alejando de su hijo. Sin embargo, Deshawn se enteró recientemente de que no está en el certificado de nacimiento de su hijo, ¡así que quiere una prueba de ADN!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Stephanie dio a luz a un niño y cree que Brandon es el padre. Pero Brandon afirma que no supo del niño hasta tres años después y niega ser el padre. Stephanie y su mamá quieren que Brandon se haga cargo.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Megan quería saber si su novio Devin era infiel. ¡Pero salieron a la luz secretos de relaciones aún peores! Además, te sorprenderá saber por qué Laura y Steven necesitan que Steve los ayude otra vez.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Desmond cree que su ex, Cassandra, está inventando todo un cuento de que él ha tocado a su hijo porque está celosa de su nueva prometida. Después, Tammy ha sido investigada por abuso infantil e incluso acusada de encerrar a sus hijos en un armario.

programme.desc: Luffy’s grudge match with Franky gets serious when his opponent turns out to be a cyborg! Iceberg awakes from his slumber only to hurl heinous accusations at the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is branded an assassin and attacked by Iceberg’s strongest men! Meanwhile, Sanji and Chopper attempt to warn Usopp about an impending natural disaster!

programme.desc: The citizens of Water Seven search for the Straw Hats and a devastating storm threatens to sink the city. Chopper and Sanji pick up Robin’s trail, but they aren’t prepared for what they’ll find.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp prepares to ride out the storm aboard the Going Merry, Franky hatches a plan to force Luffy into a rematch, and the Straw Hats set out to uncover Robin’s dark secret.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin and her CP9 brethren seek to settle unfinished business with Iceberg. The Straw Hats have a plan to clear their names, but the assassins are one step ahead of them.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: CP9 listens to Iceberg’s blood to learn the location of the blueprints, Usopp has another run-in with Franky and the remaining Straw Hats – plus a new friend – race to the rescue!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the gang come face to face with Robin and her CP9 comrades. The rubberman is prepared to fight for his friend, but he’s never faced foes like this!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami are sent hurtling toward their deaths by the villains of CP9! Meanwhile, Usopp forges an unlikely friendship with Franky while waiting out a storm.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys

programme.desc: Team Rocket’s latest invention is bound to be a hit...until Togepi and its newfound Sentret friend take it out for a spin!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Abraxas: Guardian of the Universe-

programme.title: Three Riffer Edition: Night of the Living Dead

programme.title: RiffTrax: Future Zone
programme.desc: Mike, Kevin and Bill splashed a fresh coat o' mud onto their Chevy Blazer and made sure any and all gloves were firmly secured in an out-of-the-way box before hopping on the highway to the Future Zone!

programme.title: RiffTrax: The Revenge of Dr X

programme.title: RiffTrax: Neutron the Atomic Superman vs. the Death Robots
programme.desc: Join Mike, Bill, and Kevin for one of the few superhero vs. robot movies to feature no actual superheroes OR robots, Neutron the Atomic Superman vs. the Death Robots!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Bloody Pit of Horror
programme.desc: Filmed in PSYCHOVISION, (which we hear Fellini used to shoot in), Bloody Pit of Horror is must see Italian horror at its cheesiest. Mike, Kevin and Bill brave the spider piñata and give it their bloody best.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Mutant
programme.desc: Not so much the X-Men kind of mutant, and not so much the Teenage Ninja Turtle kind of mutant, Mutant is all about that most iconic form of mutant: the one that seems a lot like a zombie.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Curse of Bigfoot
programme.desc: Well, we found it. The Santa and the Ice Cream Bunny of horror films. Read that again. Reflect on it. Maybe discuss it with your local librarian.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The Tok'ra must take refuge from the Goa'uld at the SGC Alpha Site occupied by Jaffa. Bad blood between the races begins to boil as an assassin wreaks havoc on the camp. Can O'Neill stop the bloodshed before the assassin escapes with coordinates?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 visits Pangar, a planet inhabited by humans who have developed a drug that makes their immune systems perfect. Unknown to SG-1 is the means by which the drug is produced, a startling discovery that may hold the key to the origins of the Tok'ra!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Rogue NSA officers hijack the X-303 spaceship and demand that Adrian Conrad be brought to the ship. Using his Goa'uld knowledge, Conrad activates the X-303 and takes the ship light-years from Earth as O'Neill and Teal'c stage a daring rescues.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When SG-1 is marooned in deep space, Thor comes to the rescue. He then seek O'Neill's help to combat the Replicators. Convinced they will attack earth if not stopped, O'Neill stages a daring mission to stop the Replicators once and for all.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 returns from a mission with an artifact that triggers the ability to see hideous yet harmless life forms in a parallel reality. As the effect spreads to civilians, O'Neill and his team must find a solution before mass hysteria breaks out.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Senator Kinsey suffers an assassination attempt while campaigning for the presidency, and O'Neill is caught on tape leaving the building where the shots were fired. With O'Neill behind bars, Carter, Teal'c and Jonas must prove his innocence.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Colonel Maybourne visits O'Neill and claims to have a key to a cache of alien technology, but demands a presidential pardon in exchange for it. When SG-1 accompanies Maybourne to retrieve it, they find his intentions may not be all they seem.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: Amber is shocked that Leah has been subpoenaed in a case against her doctor. Maci empathizes when Jade reveals she isn’t speaking to her mom. Cheyenne can’t believe Briana’s fight. The OGs hope that Ashley & Bar can make it through their rocky phase.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: Girls' Night In is back! Jade & Chau crack jokes while Catelynn & Tyler find out they are having a girl. Deb & Barb worry Mackenzie's snack intervention won't help her father. Bar & Ashley commend Maci & Taylor for calling out Bentley's grandparents.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: It's another Girls' Night In and all the moms are startled to learn that Tyler is going to try ketamine treatment. Leah & her friends empathize with Amber who breaks down during therapy.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: The moms get comfy as they start another Girls Night In! Jade, Briana, Brittany & special guest Jenelle are impressed with Mackenzie's business moves. The Young & Pregnant moms reflect on their own sexuality after Amber comes out as bisexual.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: Amber joins Jade & Chau to explain some behind the scenes conversations. Deb & Barb are shocked that Cate is considering having Nova in the delivery room. Ashley & Bar joke that Maci & Taylor need to rekindle their romance instead of cleaning the garage.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: Ashley, Tea & Chris struggle to relate when Maci opens up to Bentley about her PTSD. The Y&P moms question Mackenzie's parenting & her parenting coordinator. Jade, Chau, & special guest Amber discuss Amber's anxiety surrounding her grades.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: Everyone is excited that Catelynn & Tyler will visit Carly. Leah talks about wanting a baby as she watches Cheyenne prepare to be induced for baby Ace. And for the first time in years, Amber reunites with Leah.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: Briana & Brittany suspect more than diabetes is to blame when Mackenzie lashes out. Sean, Jade & Chau commend Gary for seeing a parenting coach. Ashley & Bar watch Cheyenne go into labor. The Y&P moms discuss Taylor's decision to get therapy.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: Leah tears up as Cheyenne gives birth to her son. Briana swoons over Tyler's romantic plans for Catelynn's babymoon. Barb & Deb take Taylor's side when he argues with Maci over childcare. Jade & Chau are excited to see Mackenzie's Dad.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Ricardo recibe una llamada de Constanza y no puede contener el llanto. Una carta anónima llega a las manos de Gastón. Verónica y Lucho le alertan que se trata de una trampa. Antonia juega con Alberto y después manda a que le den una brutal golpiza.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín descubre a los amantes y empieza a gritar, desesperado Fernando le tapa la boca hasta desmayarlo, lo da por muerto y monta el cuerpo en el carro para deshacerse de él, Martín reacciona.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín despierta en un sanatorio, los empleados de los Reyes reportan normalidad en la hacienda Elizondo; sin embargo, las hermanas deciden comprobar por sus propios medios lo que sucede.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: El administrador del sanatorio descubre quién es Martín y lo manipula para que no diga nada, Hortencia se interesa en él. Sarita, Ruth y Antonio vigilan el rancho Elizondo por las noches.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela llega al cuarto de su papá y encuentra a Malcolm vestido como él, Dínora le asegura que si firma el poder para que Fernando pueda vender la hacienda, la llevan a ver a Martín.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Soledad llega para retirar los cargos en contra de Alcides y salvarlo en el momento más crítico. El doctor Umaña sigue a Beatriz y llega hasta la cabaña, escucha la voz de un hombre.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Hugo reta a Arturo en un duelo, Soledad y Eloísa están dispuestas a todo para impedirlo, aunque ambas creen que se trata de Alcides. Enrico intenta salvar a Lucas de un grave peligro.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Soledad decide quedarse en la hacienda con Hugo, ella establece condiciones, pero él también. Eloísa cree que ha logrado proteger a Alcides, pero entre sus planes deja un cabo suelto.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Paquito lleva a cabo un plan macabro porque no soporta la idea de perder a Eloísa, pero las circunstancias escapan de su control, cuando se celebra el bautizo de Aurora.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Los Lobos quieren saber dónde se metió Gertrudis. Verónica niega que esté en la Fortaleza, pero la tiene encerrada en el sótano de su casa. Verónica Dantés aprovecha un beso de Alejandro para cortarle un mechón de pelo para la prueba de ADN.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro daría lo que le queda de vida por volver a ver a Gabriela. Siente que Verónica besa como ella. Ramón cuenta que Antonia mandó a matar al Tigre y asegura que Alberto hizo detonar la mina. Alejandro y Lucho pelean por el amor de Verónica.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica besa a Lucho y logra mantenerlo a su lado. Ante la insistencia de Alejandro, ella le dice que está comprometida con Lucho. Irene le cuenta a su hermana que Alejandro y Verónica son amantes. Max pierde el trabajo por defender a Valentina.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Ricardo recibe una llamada de Constanza y no puede contener el llanto. Una carta anónima llega a las manos de Gastón. Verónica y Lucho le alertan que se trata de una trampa. Antonia juega con Alberto y después manda a que le den una brutal golpiza.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín descubre a los amantes y empieza a gritar, desesperado Fernando le tapa la boca hasta desmayarlo, lo da por muerto y monta el cuerpo en el carro para deshacerse de él, Martín reacciona.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The five remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at the Pinang Peranakan Mansion in Penang, Malaysia and head to Singapore, where they learn that a U-Turn awaits.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The four remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at Marina Barrage in Singapore and fly to Shanghai, China.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The four remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at the Shanghai Science and Technology Museum, with Louie and Michael knowing a Speed Bump awaits them.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Brent and Caite, Jet and Cord, and Dan and Jordan leave Shanghai and head to San Francisco and the finish line.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: This season's racers are introduced and for the first time in the history of The Amazing Race, the team to finish in first place will be awarded a surprise, game-changing advantage.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One team considers using their precious Express Pass after playful Ghanaian locals give some teams a headache while they struggle to complete the high-stakes roadblock.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A challenging detour tests one couple's relationship, while another team's Racer requires medical attention, threatening their position in the competition.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After teams volunteer at a local school in Ghana, THE AMAZING RACE makes it's first-ever trip to the Arctic Circle, where one couple finds themselves in an unfortunate position and contemplate making a game changing decision.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A vegetarian racer struggles with a difficult decision when faced with a Norwegian delicacy, and Teams face their fears of heights during a gut-wrenching Roadblock.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers struggle to complete their creative detours before putting in a proper day's work in the fields, where they discover the key to potato farming is manure.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams are clowning around when they learn a traditional Russian circus act, but it's no joke when multiple teams make a critical error and misread a clue, jeopardizing their positions in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Following a huge mistake, one Racer makes an important decision that will impact their team beyond the finish line and for the rest of their lives.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Tension among the teams runs high when, for the first time ever, two teams are U-turned and have to complete an extra task, jeopardizing their chances of making it to the final four.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy takes a week off, leaving Barney and Gomer in charge. A prisoner also takes off in the resultant confusion.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gomer falls asleep on the job and Andy douses a fire to save his life. Gomer becomes a menace trying to repay the favor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee saves money by buying a side of beef. The beef is tough, the freezer conks out, and Gomer attempts to fix the motor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A strange mountain-style divorce ritual is frustrated by another ritual performed by Barney.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Opie gets caught in a scheme to sell a useless product, Barney and Gomer come to his rescue.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Joyce Jameson and Jean Carson appear as two fun-loving blondes who upset the sheriff's office.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: British comedian Bernard Fox plays an Englishman who returns to Mayberry and upsets Aunt Bee with his efficiency.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney interprets a kiss as a sign of a secret engagement between Andy and Helen. The town gets the word and prepares a surprise party for the couple.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney is furious when he sees his girl Thelma Lou kiss, Gomer.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy takes his son Opie and several of his pals on a camping trip. Barney and Gomer tag along to help out but only succeed in getting themselves lost in the woods.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gomer Pyle decides to join the Marine Corps and immediately falls afoul of his drill instructor Sergeant Carter.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie Taylor develops a crush on his teacher, who also happens to be his father's girlfriend.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A campaign to fatten and stretch Barney Fife gets underway when it becomes apparent he doesn't match up to Civil Service physical requirements.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee invites relatives to Mayberry for a visit but they quickly wear out their welcome.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ernest T. Bass (Howard Morris) goes back to school when his girl demands it.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy has his misgivings when Aunt Bee's old beau shows up in Mayberry and tries to win her over again.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife buys a bloodhound to aid in Mayberry law enforcement.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney and Thelma Lou have a lovers' quarrel. Andy tries to help but only succeeds in getting caught in the middle.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney starts wearing his uniform all the time after being threatened with bodily harm if he's ever caught without it on.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie almost becomes $50 richer after finding a change purse.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy goes to Raleigh for a job interview and chaos prevails in Mayberry with Barney Fife as acting sheriff.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Aunt Bee snags the starring role in the Mayberry Centennial Pageant, Andy and Opie become neglected at home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie's an unwilling participant when he's betrothed to marry a mountain family's daughter.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Helen are supposed to have a day off but are continually interrupted at their secluded picnic spot by Barney Fife asking questions about his duties.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife demonstrates gypsy fortune telling to Opie and then Opie's wishes seem to begin to come true.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Otis slips and falls in jail and is convinced by a lawyer that he should sue the county.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife decides to dabble in real estate as a side job. He tries to get the sheriff to put his house up for sale.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Tall leafy trees, almighty mountains, and puffy white clouds; a fresh and innovative painting by guest artist Diane Andre.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: An immense ice-draped mountain is Bob Ross's main focus, with grass-covered sloping hills and chipper waterfall too!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Watch and learn as Bob Ross unfolds this beautifully soft wooded scene with gently rippling brook, all inside an oval shape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: With brush in hand, Bob Ross leads you on a summertime nature walk, as you uncover the beauty of leafy trees and ponds.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates a beautiful golden warm waterfall scene, employing a lovely almost watercolor-looking effect. Come join in the fun!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: One of nature's perfect creations -- the misty, splashing waterfall -- is painted by Bob Ross, in all its magnificent splendor.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross' dramatic use of blue tones results in an emotional depiction of stark waves at night - all tucked inside an oval shape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Drive through mountain country with Bob Ross and happen upon a ridge of thick, rich evergreens gracing the hollow below.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The field of snow and the little cabin yield to the bright, orange sun -- Bob Ross conveys harmony in this cold, but cozy scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Visit a quaint little home with Bob Ross and experience the beauty of tender morn in the stillness of the forest; what a delightful painting.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Stroll along the beach at sunset with Bob Ross and feel the gentle breezes blow as the waves softly kiss the shore in this oval masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A real Bob Ross favorite - he uses blue and red highlights to accentuate the drama and beauty of a snow-bound cabin at sunset.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross gently places a little old church house upon a bed of snow in front of giant frost-covered mountains in the background.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Using a different technique or two, Bob Ross creates a fascinating scene - watch the sun drop below the horizon, just behind the shadow of trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes you to a lovely spot deep in the woods where the seclusion, silence, and beauty offer serenity to the soul.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: An abandoned shipping boat hugs a pier in a water scene that Bob Ross completes with some charming old dockside storage sheds.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Roll up your trousers and walk the beach with Bob Ross; enjoy a sky full of clouds and waves crashing carelessly upon the rocks.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross invites you for a walk on the shore; soothing waves rolling in from the sea to the palm trees - all in a delightful seashell shape on the canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross begins with a black canvas to create this startling rendition of a snowy landscape with the notorious lights of the northern sky.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross presents a really unique idea using black gesso -- two lovely paintings in one -- summer and winter scenes overlapping on the same canvas!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Follow the old dirt road to that quaint country barn nestled in nature's greenery - Bob Ross paints your destination today.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Narrow, winding, rocky - this little Bob Ross style creek moves closer and closer, flowing aimlessly through a happy little meadow forest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel to a lonely hidden cabin in the frozen mountainous north country with Bob Ross -- another black canvas masterpiece to fall in love with.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes of animal care with Jack to a special turtle hospital in Marathon, Fla. See what it takes to rehabilitate the reptiles and watch a release back Into the Wild! Then Jack visits the Dolphin Research Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he counts down six species that turn heads, like moose, elk, Cape Buffalo, proboscis monkeys and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads to Asia to visit the Singapore Zoo. Regarded as one of the top zoos in the world, this open-concept park is full of surprises for Jack and Sue, like orangutans swinging in the trees just feet above their heads

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Miniature Marvels
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets some mini marvels of the animal world like, the mighty miniature donkeys, petite pygmy elephants, pint-sized Little penguins, high-flying hummingbirds, and more.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he heads to South Africa to meet a very special, and critically endangered, Southern black Rhino named Munu, who's lost his vision, but found his forever home at Founder's Lodge.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Helpers
programme.desc: Prepare to be amazed by seven true stories of some truly remarkable service animals on today’s Wild Countdown! From K-9 cops to dolphin detectives, we’re counting down seven remarkable animal super stars!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he discovers the survival secrets of crafty prey species. Wildebeest, Zebra, Wombats, Poison Dart Frogs, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack for some of his scariest animal encounters with Lions, Crocodiles, Snakes, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Dangerously Cute
programme.desc: When it comes to wildlife, sometimes danger wears a disguise. Today, Jungle Jack is looking at the dark side of six deceptively darling animals, from the poison dart frog and duck-billed platypus to the hippopotamus. Find out which creature is number one.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads into South Africa's Zululand and Hluhluwe-iMfolozi Park – the oldest nature reserve in Africa, where he encounters Baboons, Elephant, Rhino and more, all after witnessing the birth of a baby at the Zulu Nyala Game Reserve.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animals and Traditions
programme.desc: Today, meet Kenya’s Masai cattle herders, Thailand’s mahouts and their elephants, the cowboys down south in South America, plus many more cultured creatures on this Wild Countdown!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: See Jack dive with a bull shark, encounter a highly venomous sea snake and get in a sticky situation with a sea creature. Then Jack takes part in some local traditions and learns of Fiji's ominous past.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Central Florida, Jack assists in the release of eight captive-born Whooping Cranes, considered among the rarest and most endangered birds in the world. Jack also goes up in a helicopter for the annual survey of Florida's Bald Eagle population.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: All of the creatures on today’s countdown are livin’ large! Join Jungle Jack as he counts downs the biggest land animals on the planet – hippos, rhinos, elephants and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: From the largest African elephant Jack has ever seen, to the littlest elephants on the planet…come along for the journey of a lifetime with the biggest land mammals on the planet!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his family as they explore Rwanda's Nyungwe Forest encountering wild Chimpanzees, and Colobus Monkeys. They also get lessons from the locals on traditional tea picking and modern beekeeping.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: A Nose Knows
programme.desc: Feeling nosey? Today’s Countdown has got you covered with some of the most notorious noses in the animal kingdom. Seven remarkable stories of creatures that use their noses to flirt, fight and even shower!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Join him as he visits some of his favorite aquariums and zoological parks, which are on a mission to help save wildlife. Meet sun bears, moose, sea lion pups, a baby rhino, and other wild animals that are all part of new zoo and aquarium programs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he searches for the greatest ape species, like Gorillas, Orangutans, Chimpanzees, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack explores the red island known as Rabida in Ecuador's Galapagos Islands. See Darwin Finches, Sea Lions, Pelicans and loads of other creatures living on the enchanting island!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Seeing Red
programme.desc: Jungle Jack Hanna is seeing red in this exclusive Wild Countdown! Discover why this color is so important to the survival of these animals in their natural habitats and find out who comes out on top!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Rest Stops
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is on an epic animal road trip, meeting up with amazing creatures at the wildest rest stops on the planet! Sea turtles nesting in West Africa, whale sharks feeding in Belize, birds wading in Canada and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack kicks things off in western Canada where he learns the horse riding ropes from a genuine cowboy, then he heads to Florida to visit a very different kind of retirement home, all before seeing an incredible horse whisperer at work in California.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Seeing is Believing
programme.desc: Today, you’ll see six stories about extraordinary creatures with incredible senses. Some can see their victims from miles away, others navigate in complete darkness, and some even find their victims just by sensing body heat!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack in Kenya as he tracks a trio of hunting cheetahs, braves a pack of scavenging jackals, and then with his wife Sue meets an extremely endangered and undeniably cute baby black rhino.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Gone Fishin
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack is counting down his most unbelievable big fish stories from beneath the waves!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Ecuador's diverse landscapes are home to loads of unique creatures. Visit the Mashpi cloud forests, home to hummingbirds and bushmasters; witness birds of prey in flight near Otavalo's colorful markets; and the Quito Zoo welcomes a baby jaguar.

programme.desc: A producer of TV commercials casts Judy in a singing spot without first checking out the quality of her voice.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Ace has mixed feelings when a girlfriend from the past returns in a wheelchair.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An aggressive woman causes confusion when she's sets her sights on the chaperone of a musical group. At the same time, a young woman changes her appearance to get the attention of the man who wouldn't hire her.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A stiff British ex-military officer is put in charge of the fun-loving and energy-filled Menudo group; a young couple is confouded because Doc seems very much in love with his visiting ex-wife, a fact Doc attributes to the fact that he is divorced.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A hurricane devastates the tropical island where a shore party of Capt. Stubing, his crew members, and passengers are held captive by a strange hermit while the Pacific Princess totters under the command of a bumbling deputy captain.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In Part 2, the captain and crew are still marooned.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Julie's parents arrive on board the Pacific Princess and announce their plans to divorce.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A man makes a move on three women; not knowing that they are traveling companions.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Captain Stubing's Uncle Cyrus uses every trick in his devious mind to get Julie alone, until her "Aunt Phoebe" intervenes; a desperate businessman uses his daughter as bait to close a deal.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A shy young man becomes a completely different person at night; a businessman who doesn't have time for his family learns a valuable lesson.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A magician keeps his engagement secret in order to dazzle female audiences, while his neglected fiancee turns to Captain Stubing for comfort.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In "Accidental Cruise," the executive and his secretary come aboard a bit tipsy, are mistaken for another couple, and assigned the honeymoon suite.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A ghost experiences jealousy as his mission to find his wife a new husband appears to be succeeding.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Crew members make a valiant effort to keep six stowaways a secret from Capt. Stubing; a church member disapproves of her minister's new romance; a nearly-blind woman refuses to admit her problem until Doc intercedes. (TV-PG)

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA analysis overturns the convictions of three men who have spent years behind bars, paying for crimes they did not commit.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They say that a burden shared is a burden halved, but when partners team up to commit murder, the weight of their guilt remains just as heavy. Investigators must rely on forensic science to capture partners in crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Botany & Geology: Plants help provide oxygen and nutrients for existence. Soil is the fertilizer of life. Yet both can yield clues to the time and location of a person's death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Time of death is an important consideration in a murder investigation, but when a killer freezes, burns, or grinds his victim, even the most skilled medical examiner would be at a loss about how to calculate it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Missing Person: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Worldwide, the number of missing persons nearly triples.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Killers often attempt to deflect attention away from their crimes by hiding the remains of their victims. Bodies may lay hidden for years before they are discovered.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Argentine family moves to North Fork. The townspeople are unfriendly to them, making fun of their clothing and customs. The Argentinean adult immigrant is openly hostile in return.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After the end of the Civil War, General Phil Sheridan, who has been appointed Governor of the New Mexico Territory, is on an inspection tour of the country.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas McCain's, a traveling photographer, comes to North Fork plying his trade. When a murder is committed, the photographer is accused of the crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas welcomes his old friend Tom Birch, who once saved his life, unaware that the man is now a bank robber on the run with his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury, released from Yuma prison, arrives in North Fork intent on getting even with Marshal Torrance, who helped send him to jail.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark McCain is eager to help lawman Jay Jefferson, who has arrived in North Fork intent on killing an outlaw for the reward, whether he is the right man or not.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas comes to the rescue when escaped convicts hold up the general store in North Fork and take Marshall Torrance hostage.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mike Ferris finds himself in a town strangely devoid of people. But despite the emptiness, he has the odd feeling that he's being watched...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A street salesman cleverly eludes Death. But if he lives, a little girl must die in his place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An aging, former movie star lives and dreams in the past, constantly watching her old movies alone in her room.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Martin Sloan, driving through the country, leaves his car and starts to walk toward his hometown, Homewood. He finds things exactly as they were when he was a child. He soon realizes he's gone back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hypochondriac exchanges his soul for immortality and indestructibility.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Corry is stranded on an asteroid after being convicted of a crime. He receives as a present a robot who looks, sounds, and acts like a real woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bank teller, Henry Bemis, longs for time alone to read books. He gets his wish...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is terrified of falling asleep for fear he might die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In 1942, a German wonders why he's on the deck of a British steamship, with no memory of how he got there, and an overwhelming sense of impending doom.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts have returned from this first space flight. Major Gart is hospitalized with a broken leg. The other two, Colonels Harrington and Forbes head for a bar. Harrington gets a strange feeling…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A two-bit thug thinks he's found the key to a better life in an old sidewalk salesman who has the uncanny ability to tell people what they need the most.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man who can change his face to resemble others gets into hot water with gangsters.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: With all-out nuclear war about to ignite, a scientist and his pilot friend plot to escape on an experimental spaceship.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts crash on what they believe to be an asteroid. Unfortunately they have only limited water supplies to sustain them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Alone on a cross-country trip, a woman continually sees the same hitch-hiker everywhere she looks.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Tight fisted Franklin Gibbs is not pleased when his wife wins a trip for two to Las Vegas. But things change when he falls under the spell of a slot machine that calls his name.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A World War I flying ace flies through a mysterious cloud - and lands at a modern U.S. air base in the year 1959!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Lt. Fitzgerald has found his own special wartime hell. Looking into the faces of his men prior to battle, he has the disquieting ability to see who is about to die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts land on what looks like Earth 200 years before they left--only all of the people seem frozen in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Millicent Barnes sees her double at a bus terminal.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Paranoia strikes the residents of Maple Street when they believe human-looking aliens have invaded the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Businessman Arthur Curtis discovers that life as he knows it doesn't really exist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Walter Jameson is an excellent history teacher who talks about the past as if he had lived it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a space exploration crashes on Mars, the surviving passenger is surprised to find that Martians are human-looking, very friendly and apparently just like us...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Just before being hanged for shooting a man in the back, a man in 1880 is transported into the year 1959 by a professor who soon realizes that he has brought forward a savage killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An over-the-hill boxer gets a boost from one of his biggest fans - a little boy with an unwavering belief in magic.
